summary: Iteration 88 - Tested CCTV Remote DVR support. Backend tests: 10/10 passed. Fixed DVR ID collision bug (now uses microseconds). All new features verified working: connection_type field, snapshot no longer blocks cloud DVRs, helpful error messages, stream-info returns correct type. Frontend verified: 3 connection type buttons, port forwarding help, Setup Guide with Remote DVR Setup section.
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/cctv.py - Fixed DVR ID generation to include microseconds (%f) to prevent ID collisions when creating multiple DVRs quickly
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST DVRs during backend testing (remote, local, cloud_with_ip, cloud_no_ip)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CCTV Remote DVR features fully working. Key changes: 1) Snapshot endpoint no longer blocks cloud DVRs - returns connection error or helpful IP message, 2) New connection_type field ('remote','local','cloud') in DVR model, 3) Stream-info endpoint returns correct type based on connection_type, 4) Frontend Add DVR dialog has 3 connection type buttons with port forwarding help for Remote IP, 5) Setup Guide has comprehensive Remote DVR Setup section with port forwarding and DDNS instructions, 6) Fixed bug: DVR ID generation now uses microseconds to prevent ID collisions.

snapshot_endpoint.remote_dvr: Returns 502/504 connection error (expected - no real DVR)
snapshot_endpoint.local_dvr: Returns 502/504 connection error (expected - no real DVR)
snapshot_endpoint.cloud_with_ip: Returns 502/504 connection error - no longer blocked
snapshot_endpoint.cloud_no_ip: Returns 400 with helpful message about adding public IP

dvr_id_generation.issue: Was using only seconds precision causing ID collisions

add_dvr_dialog.port_forwarding_help: Shown for Remote IP type with message about forwarding ports

devices_tab.connection_type_badge: Shows Remote IP / Local IP / Cloud badge per DVR

mocked_apis.note: Snapshot/stream endpoints return expected connection errors since no real Hikvision DVRs are connected

bug_fixed.issue: DVR ID collision when creating multiple DVRs quickly
bug_fixed.root_cause: DVR ID generation used only seconds precision (strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S'))
bug_fixed.impact: All DVR CRUD operations now work correctly even when creating multiple DVRs in quick succession
